description: Devflow Skills Marketplace — Claude Code slash commands integrating all 6 layers of the devflow stack

skills.name: memory-recall

skills.name: retain-learning
skills.description: Retain a new learning or discovery into Hindsight

skills.name: reflect-session
skills.description: Reflect on the current session and consolidate learnings

skills.name: pre-push-check
skills.description: Run the full pre-push review pipeline before pushing code

skills.name: new-feature
skills.description: Start a new feature with worktree, memory recall, and workspace setup

skills.name: finish-feature
skills.description: Finish a feature with checks, commit, merge, and learning retention

skills.name: create-pr
skills.description: Full PR creation pipeline with self-review and checks

skills.name: spec-feature
skills.description: Spec a new feature with architecture recall, planning, and task breakdown

skills.name: architecture-decision
skills.description: Document an architectural decision with rationale and memory retention

skills.name: session-summary
skills.description: Generate a session summary for Langfuse tracing and observability

skills.name: update-visualizations
skills.description: Analyze recent changes and update affected architecture visualizations

skills.name: visualizations-config
skills.description: Configure visualization location, style presets, and output preferences
